emails.subject: Update
emails.body: Update Mark, Please call me re: verbatim use of wording between EOL and Confirms. Also: PCGs are checking back with confirms people regarding index descriptions and location, to make sure things are properly covered off. They are also going through the descriptions to identify cases where traders have grabbed incorrect items against the products they have created. Additional system controls are going in today and into next week to stop this sort of error from happening. Dave

emails.subject: Re: Update
emails.body: Re: Update I'm afraid I may never have called you back on this one do we still need to discuss? David Forster 09/17/99 12:52 PM
